creator: mauro@gnx.com.br
text:
Please submit information about BsdSul - Grupo de Usuários de FreeBSD do Sul do Brasil, founded in 2005 and reactived in 2024. 

Url: https://bsdsul.com.br

Mail: forum@bsdsul.com.br

Description: The BsdSul was founded in 2005 and reactived in 2024, bringing together FreeBSD enthusiasts and users in Southern Brazil. It has a website, forum and is present on some social networks.
